---
title: "43 Project"
author: "Shihang Qiu"
date: "2026-02-18"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
real_data <- read.csv("C:/Users/eyuey/Desktop/课件/哥大/STAT5243GR/session_summary_combined_new.csv")
```



```{r}
new_data <- subset(real_data, data_source == "real_imputed_users")
new_data$run_label <- NULL
```




```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

first_key_rate_data <- new_data %>%
  group_by(variant) %>%
  summarise(
    first_key_action_rate = mean(first_key_action_taken, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

ggplot(first_key_rate_data, aes(x = variant, y = first_key_action_rate, fill = variant)) +
  geom_col(alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(first_key_action_rate, 3)),
    vjust = -0.3,
    size = 5
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = percent,
    limits = c(0, max(first_key_rate_data$first_key_action_rate) + 0.1)
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "First Key Action Rate by Variant",
    x = "Variant",
    y = "First Key Action Rate"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```


```{r}
ggplot(new_data, aes(x = variant, y = num_events, fill = variant)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Events by Variant",
    x = "Variant",
    y = "Number of Events"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```



```{r}
# =========================
# Prepare data
# =========================
df <- new_data[!is.na(new_data$variant), ]
table(df$variant)

# =========================
# 1. Two-sample proportion test:
#    first_key_action_taken
# =========================
tab_fka <- table(df$variant, df$first_key_action_taken)
print(tab_fka)

prop_test_fka <- prop.test(
  x = tab_fka[, "1"],
  n = rowSums(tab_fka),
  correct = FALSE
)

print(prop_test_fka)

# =========================
# 2. Two-sample proportion test:
#    task_completed
# =========================
tab_task <- table(df$variant, df$task_completed)
print(tab_task)

prop_test_task <- prop.test(
  x = tab_task[, "1"],
  n = rowSums(tab_task),
  correct = FALSE
)

print(prop_test_task)

# =========================
# 3. Welch t-test:
#    session_duration
# =========================
welch_session <- t.test(session_duration ~ variant, data = df)
print(welch_session)

# =========================
# 4. Welch t-test:
#    num_events
# =========================
welch_events <- t.test(num_events ~ variant, data = df)
print(welch_events)
```
